title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — Americas — Q2 FY2026 (May – July 2026)
summary: The Americas faces synchronized federal and state-level crypto compliance infrastructure buildout through September 2026. The United States dominates with 16 events—FinCEN's foundational BSA/AML reform comment period closes June 9, GENIUS Act stablecoin issuer AML frameworks enter 60-day comment windows, and multiple states advance VASP licensing regimes. Canada implements FATF Travel Rule enforcement while Latin America's largest economies finalize VASP registration frameworks. This creates imm
